metadata.description: Deterministic physics-domain overrides for specific DD path patterns whose semantic subject the tier-1 LLM classifier mis-assigns against the correct IDS-level default. Consulted after the LLM in _classify_batch; a match pins the domain and sets domain_source='deterministic_override'. Match is a substring test on the DD path id (all listed substrings must be present).
metadata.principle: Domain follows the semantic subject/function of the quantity (see plan decision domain-principle=semantic-subject).

overrides.rationale: Gyrocenter (guiding-center) orbit frequencies are kinetic orbit-dynamics quantities from the distributions IDS (whose default is transport); the LLM mis-routed them to computational_workflow. Every charged particle has a gyrocenter, so this is orbit/transport physics, not a workflow artifact.

Lower-hybrid antenna hardware quantities (e.g. pressure_tank) are intrinsic to the LH heating subsystem; by semantic-subject they follow auxiliary_heating (the lh_antennas IDS default), not plant_systems.
